case_title: THOMPSON, CALVIN vs. LEE, TOSCA M. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GLENN H. WECHSLER RE:DEFAULT UNDER STIP. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, CALVIN
DECLARATION OF GLENN H. WECHSLER IN SUPPOR OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, CALVIN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, CALVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, TOSCA M. RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TOSCA M.
